session_focus: Fix panels that still look empty even though the DAG is complete.
user_directives: Fix panels that still look empty even though the DAG is complete.
assistant_responses: Built a canonical activity feed from artifacts, retrieval logs, memory, and iterations, then used it as a fallback renderer. Variant 13 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Empty-state design is part of truthfulness; silence should still render as meaningful repo state.

Quiet logs left visible sections blank, making the GUI feel inactive despite repo-backed state being present. Variant 13 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
